song.title: God Hath Not Promised
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics: [v1] .Dm A# F C God hath not promised skies always blue, .Dm A# F C Flower strewn pathways all our lives thru; .Am A# Dm-D-G God has not promised sun without rain, . F C A# F Joy without sorrow, peace without pain. [c] .D# A# F But God hath promised strength for the day, .D# A# Gm - F - C Rest for the labor, light for the way, .Am A# Dm-A-G Grace for the trials, help from above, . F C A# F Unfailing sympathy, undying love. [v2] .Dm A# F C God hath not promised we shall not know .Dm A# F C Toil and temptation, trouble and woe; .Am A# Dm-D-G He hath not told us we shall not bear . F C A# F Many a burden, many a care. [v3] .Dm A# F C God hath not promised smooth roads and wide, .Dm A# F C Swift, easy travel, needing no guide; .Am A# Dm-D-G Never a mountain, rocky and steep, . F C A# F Never a river, turbid and deep.
